blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 377 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
